'''竏嘛-dh-s-m''' ('''kavadhsemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teasel|teasel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teasel|teasel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘛-dh-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhsemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhsemoko|thivadhsemoko]] || [[word:jivadhsemoko|jivadhsemoko]] || [[word:shivadhsemoko|shivadhsemoko]] || [[word:kivadhsemoko|kivadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhsemoko|thuthuvadhsemoko]] || [[word:jujuvadhsemoko|jujuvadhsemoko]] || [[word:shushuvadhsemoko|shushuvadhsemoko]] || [[word:kukuvadhsemoko|kukuvadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvadhsemoko|thuvadhsemoko]] || [[word:juvadhsemoko|juvadhsemoko]] || [[word:shuvadhsemoko|shuvadhsemoko]] || [[word:kuvadhsemoko|kuvadhsemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovadhsemoko|thothovadhsemoko]] || [[word:jojovadhsemoko|jojovadhsemoko]] || [[word:shoshovadhsemoko|shoshovadhsemoko]] || [[word:kokovadhsemoko|kokovadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovadhsemoko|thovadhsemoko]] || [[word:jovadhsemoko|jovadhsemoko]] || [[word:shovadhsemoko|shovadhsemoko]] || [[word:kovadhsemoko|kovadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadhsemoko|thovadhsemoko]] || [[word:jovadhsemoko|jovadhsemoko]] || [[word:shovadhsemoko|shovadhsemoko]] || [[word:kovadhsemoko|kovadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦvadhsemoko|thﾃｦvadhsemoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦvadhsemoko|jﾃｦvadhsemoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦvadhsemoko|shﾃｦvadhsemoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦvadhsemoko|kﾃｦvadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadhsemoko|thathavadhsemoko]] || [[word:jajavadhsemoko|jajavadhsemoko]] || [[word:shashavadhsemoko|shashavadhsemoko]] || [[word:kakavadhsemoko|kakavadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavadhsemoko|thavadhsemoko]] || [[word:javadhsemoko|javadhsemoko]] || [[word:shavadhsemoko|shavadhsemoko]] || [[word:kavadhsemoko|kavadhsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavadhsemoko|thavadhsemoko]] || [[word:javadhsemoko|javadhsemoko]] || [[word:shavadhsemoko|shavadhsemoko]] || [[word:kavadhsemoko|kavadhsemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
